operator: Codex local verification with user-authorized environment access

commands.summary: Current shell/backend dotenv does not provide AI_COST_PRICING_JSON; required runtime models are gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o-mini, and gpt-4o.

A temporary candidate catalog with source/version and the three required model keys validates successfully, but it is not configured in release/prod env and has not been recorded as business-approved release pricing.

commands.artifact_path: docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/App-Release-DB-Parity-2026-05-14T14-15-53-642Z.json
commands.summary: A non-local PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL was checked. Release DB parity is not passed: 7 of 14 release-blocking migrations are applied; 7 required migrations are missing.

blocked_requirements: Release or production backend environment must provide AI_COST_PRICING_JSON.
Pricing catalog must include source and version, with version starting with YYYY-MM-DD.
Pricing catalog must cover OPENAI_MODEL, OPENAI_INTERVIEW_MODEL, OPENAI_ANALYSIS_MODEL, and any AI_COST_REQUIRED_MODELS.
Pricing values must be approved by the release owner before a pass artifact is written.
Release DB parity must pass against a non-local release or production PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL; the checked target is missing required migrations.

decision.reason: A candidate pricing catalog can satisfy the local validator, but release/prod env lacks AI_COST_PRICING_JSON and the checked non-local release DB is missing required migrations. Creating AI-Pricing-Release-Env-*.json with status=passed would overstate release readiness.
